returns._0: string[] Array of all registered machine IDs

getMachineIdByPublicKey(string).details: Get machine ID by public key (login functionality)

getPublicKeyByMachineId(string).details: Get public key by machine ID

getTotalRegisteredMachines().details: Get total number of registered machines

isMachineIdExists(string).details: Check if a machine ID is already registered

renounceOwnership().details: Renounce ownership (set owner to zero address)
